falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 Index closes below the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a bear market continuation, invalidating the expectation of a bottom pattern and proving the HOLD signal incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX Volatility Index spikes above 30 and remains above that level for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained spike in volatility would signal extreme market fear, contradicting the stability implied by the bottom pattern and falsifying the current verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 50 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in the blowoff score would indicate heightened urgency and pressure, invalidating the current pattern match and suggesting a different market dynamic than a bottom.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
